arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Lille 1 - 0 Real Madrid, Post-game, Champions League 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani gives his analysis on Real Madrid ’s performance against Lille. It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: Lille sink Madrid to end 14-game UCL unbeaten run
arts.sum: A first-half penalty earned Lille a shock 1-0 home victory over holders Real Madrid in the Champions League group phase on Wednesday, ending the 15-times European Cup winners' 14-game unbeaten run in the competition.

arts.ttl: ‘Bad’ – Carlo Ancelotti slams Real Madrid stars for display vs Lille
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Wednesday night taken firm aim at his players. As much comes owing to their performance in the club’s latest outing. Real of…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid suffer Champions League defeat as Jude Bellingham frustrated in new role
arts.sum: UCL ROUND-UP: Jude Bellingham and co lost for the first time this season as they faced Lille on a dramatic night in the Champions League, while 10-man Juventus pulled off a gutsy comeback

arts.ttl: Rüdiger should have been sent off - Real Madrid Champions League referee analysis
arts.sum: It wasn’t enough for VAR to intervene and give a straight red, but it was definitely a second yellow,” Iturralde explained. That’s the conclusion of AS’s referee analyst, Iturralde González, regarding the controversy in Real Madrid’s defeat to Lille in tonight’s Champions League match.

arts.ttl: Arda Güler sends message to Carlo Ancelotti in Real Madrid’s defeat to Lille
arts.sum: Real Madrid youngster Arda Güler tonight sent a message the way of head coach Carlo Ancelotti. As much came by way of his late cameo in Real’s meeting with LOSC…

arts.ttl: Lille 1-0 Real Madrid: Highlights, man of the match, stats as David hits winner
arts.sum: Jonathan David scores the winner as Lille record a shock 1-0 victory over Champions League holders Real Madrid in France.

arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | Lille 1-0 Real Madrid: Jonathan David penalty stuns European champions
arts.sum: UEFA Champions League, Round 2, 02/10/2024 History awaited at the Stade Pierre Mauroy as the minutes ticked away and a stadium waited in anticipation for the final whistle. When it…
Champions League match day two saw Real Madrid travel to France to face Lille, with Endrick getting an opportunity from the start. Half-time: Lille 1 - 0 Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Brazil teenager Endrick becomes youngest Champions League starter for Real Madrid
arts.sum: At 18 years, 73 days old, the Brazil forward became the youngest player to start a Champions League match with the Spanish powerhouse in the game at Lille on Wednesday. Endrick also is the youngest foreign player to score for Madrid in the Spanish league.
